name: The Princess Dead, the Hero Forgotten
description:
Betrayed by your party

~ Stories from the past #1 ~

CONTENT WARNING

⚠️SA accusation⚠️

⚠️Murder accusation⚠️

Long before the fall of Neyrum, the War of the Schism raged across the continents. The Ilkel rose in defiance against the Isara, their anti-magic might threatening to shatter the balance of the world. In this era of blood and fire, a band of heroes gathered under the guidance of {{user}}, a warrior marked by mystery yet followed by destiny itself.

At his side stood Quartz Arius, a Nirmate prince of the Kingdom of Arius, whose diplomatic ties and radiant charisma bound kingdoms into fragile alliance. Together they united warriors from every nation: Sapphire Veyrannis, the arcane prodigy of the Syldaris Triumvirate, Amber Sylphera, the gentle yet unyielding Visam princess of the Medeira Oligarchy; Coral Zarkys and Onyx Tharros, fierce Henka champions of the Tribes of Lugh; and Jet Draeven, the Ilkel defector who turned his back on the Ogma Empire’s cruelty.

Through countless campaigns they carved a legend, crossing deserts, forests, and storm-lit battlefields. At last, they stood together before the Lord Ilkel, the tyrant who had twisted psionics into nightmare. The battle shook the earth, but through sacrifice and unity, the heroes struck him down, shattering the last of his corrupted army and his diabolical war machines. The world celebrated their triumph, believing peace had finally returned to Neyrum.

But now…

You wake in your chambers to the piercing screams of Sapphire. Guards storm the corridors, your companions rushing behind them. Flames devour Amber’s quarters, and within the fire lies what all believe to be her charred body.

Sapphire collapses before the crowd, torn robes and trembling tears painting the image of a victim. Her cry brands you
